users.description: User cloud profiles containing custom playlists, themes, skins, favorites, and configurations for secure synchronization across desktop and mobile devices.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last synchronization action

playlists.description: List of custom playlists with song IDs, names, and metadata

recentSongIds.description: List of recently played offline song IDs

favoriteSongIds.description: List of song IDs marked as favorites by the user

activeTheme.description: Currently active accent color or design theme

activeSkin.description: Currently active visual skin style layout override
